SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds

Interface Either<A,B>

Type Parameters:
A - The type of the Left value (usually representing an error).
B - The type of the Right value (usually representing a success).
All Superinterfaces:
Collection<B>
All Known Implementing Classes:
Either.Left, Either.Right
public interface Either<A,B> extends Collection<B>
Represents a value of one of two possible types (a disjoint union).

An instance of Either is either an instance of Either.Left or Either.Right. By convention, Left is used for failure and Right is used for success.

  • Method Details

    • build

      Either<A,B> build(B value)
      Description copied from interface: Collection
      Creates a new instance of the data structure with the provided element added. This operation is persistent and does not modify the original instance.
      Specified by:
      build in interface Collection<A>
      Parameters:
      value - The element to add.
      Returns:
      A new Collection containing the added element.

    • either

      <R> R either(Function<A,R> fa, Function<B,R> fb)
      Applies either the left function or the right function to the contained value.
      Type Parameters:
      R - The resulting type.
      Parameters:
      fa - Function to apply if this is Left.
      fb - Function to apply if this is Right.
      Returns:
      The result of applying the appropriate function.

    • left

      static <P, Q> Either<P,Q> left(P value)
      Creates a Left instance.
      Type Parameters:
      P - Left type.
      Q - Right type.
      Parameters:
      value - The value.
      Returns:
      A Left Either.

    • right

      static <P, Q> Either<P,Q> right(Q value)
      Creates a Right instance.
      Type Parameters:
      P - Left type.
      Q - Right type.
      Parameters:
      value - The value.
      Returns:
      A Right Either.

    • lefts

      static <A, B> Collection<A> lefts(Collection<Either<A,B>> es)
      Extracts all Left values from a collection of Eithers.
      Type Parameters:
      A - Left type.
      B - Right type.
      Parameters:
      es - Collection of Eithers.
      Returns:
      Collection of Left values.

    • rights

      static <A, B> Collection<B> rights(Collection<Either<A,B>> es)

      A - Left type.
      B - Right type.
      Parameters:
      es - Collection of Eithers.
      Returns:
      Collection of Right values.

    • fromRight

      @Deprecated default B fromRight(B def)
      Deprecated.
      Use orElse(Object) instead.

    • orElse

      default B orElse(B def)
      Returns the Right value if present, otherwise returns the provided default.
      Parameters:
      def - The fallback value.
      Returns:
      The Right value or def.

    • orElseGet

      default B orElseGet(Supplier<? extends B> supplier)
      Returns the Right value if present, otherwise returns the result of the supplier.
      Parameters:
      supplier - The supplier of the fallback value.
      Returns:
      The value or supplier result.

    • orElseThrow

      default <X extends Throwable> B orElseThrow(Supplier<? extends X> exceptionSupplier) throws X
      Returns the Right value if present, otherwise throws the exception from the supplier.
      Type Parameters:
      X - Type of the exception.
      Parameters:
      exceptionSupplier - The supplier of the exception.
      Returns:
      The value.
      Throws:
      X - if no value is present.

    • orElseThrow

      default <X extends Throwable> B orElseThrow(Function<A,? extends X> exceptionFunction) throws X
      Throws:
      X

      Safely extracts the Left value or returns a default.
      Parameters:
      def - Default value.
      Returns:
      The Left value or def.

      Returns true if this is a Left.

      default <R> Either<A,R> map(Function<B,R> fn)
      Description copied from interface: Collection
      Transforms each element of the collection using the provided function.

      R - The type of elements in the resulting collection.
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      A new collection containing the transformed elements.

      default <C> Either<A,C> flatMapEither(Function<B,Either<A,C>> fn)

    • bimap

      default <C, D> Either<C,D> bimap(Function<A,C> fa, Function<B,D> fb)
      Transforms both sides of the Either.
      Type Parameters:
      C - New Left type.
      D - New Right type.
      Parameters:
      fa - Left transformation function.
      fb - Right transformation function.
      Returns:
      A new Either with both values transformed.

    • swap

      default Either<B,A> swap()
      Flips the Left and Right sides.
      Returns:
      An Either where Right is now Left and vice-versa.

    • rightP

      static <L, R> Prism<Either<L,R>,R> rightP()
      Returns a Prism that focuses on the Right (success) value.

    • leftP

      static <L, R> Prism<Either<L,R>,L> leftP()
      Returns a Prism that focuses on the Left (error) value.
